summary: Iteration 22 - Meta Tab Fix Verification & Feature Testing Complete. All backend APIs pass (20/20 tests). Meta tab bug was already fixed in the code (using summary.total_leads). Fixed missing deletedLeadsAPI methods and added restore endpoint to backend. All features working correctly.

issues: Console hydration warnings about <tr> inside <span> and <span> inside <tbody> - cosmetic, doesn't affect functionality

updated_files: /app/frontend/src/api/api.js - Added getAll and restore methods to deletedLeadsAPI

meta_tab_fix.details: Meta Analytics API returns correct structure with summary.total_leads. Frontend InsightsPage.js correctly uses metaAnalytics?.summary?.total_leads. No errors when clicking Meta tab.

insights_page_tabs.details: All 9 tabs present and accessible: Overview, Branch, Team (efficiency), Follow-ups, Feedback, Campaigns, Activity, Attendance, Meta. All load without errors.

my_responsibilities.details: Super Admin: Add Responsibility button, dialog with Role/Branch/User/Title/Description/Priority/Category fields. All CRUD operations work. Shows 'Manage All Responsibilities' section with existing responsibilities.

quiz_csv_import.details: Academic Controller has 'Import from CSV' button. Dialog shows: Download Sample Format, Exam Name, Description, Duration, Pass %, file upload area, CSV format instructions, Import & Create Quiz button.

deleted_leads_report.details: Reports page shows 'Deleted Leads' report type for Branch Admin. Section loads with search box. Delete and restore flow works correctly via API.

branch_admin_sidebar.details: Branch Admin sees 'Insights' menu item in sidebar. Navigation to /insights works correctly.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Meta tab is working. Deleted leads restore endpoint added. All Insights tabs working. Quiz import feature exists for Academic Controller. Responsibilities CRUD working for Super Admin.
